scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @urlytix/shared lint && pnpm --filter api lint:check && pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.test: pnpm --filter api test && pnpm --filter web test
scripts.ci: pnpm prisma:generate && pnpm db:validate && pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate status && pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:api:e2e && pnpm build && pnpm test:web:e2e
